sentences.arabic: يَتَعَلَّمُ الطُّلَّابُ فِي حِصَّةِ الأَدَبِ قِرَاءَةَ الشِّعْرِ الْعَرَبِيِّ الْقَدِيمِ وَفَهْمَهُ.
sentences.translation: Studenti na satu književnosti uče čitati i razumjeti staru arapsku poeziju.
sentences.translationEn: Students in the literature class learn to read and understand ancient Arabic poetry.
